name: Savory Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine.
2. Drizzle melted margarine over hot popcorn; toss to coat.
3. Stir together paprika, garlic salt, and ground red pepper.
4. Sprinkle popcorn with the spice mixture and toss again.
Makes 2 servings. Each serving contains 73 calories, 2g protein, 8g carbohydrate, 4g total fat, 1g saturated fat, 151mg sodium, and 11mg potassium. One serving is a bread exchange and one serving is a fat exchange (My note: 1 teaspoon margarine is a fat exchange).
